case_title: WELLS FARGO ADVISORS, LLC VS. ANDREW SPIVEY

docket_entries.description: COURT REPORTING SERVICES LESS THAN 1 HOUR (TRANSACTION ID # 15322109) FILED BY PETITIONER WELLS FARGO ADVISORS, LLC

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jan-22-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER WELLS FARGO ADVISORS, LLC'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is granted. No opposition filed. The prevailing party is to provide a form of order.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/EG)
